notes: Initial spec from live Slot 3 audit. Copilot CLI accepted --allow-all and --yolo locally; slot docs prefer --allow-all for clarity.

session_model.notes: Interactive TUI remained alive during Slot 3. ANT room routing worked via PTY-injected prompts and ant chat send; ant-channel MCP startup failure was non-blocking.

events.label: Model thinking

detection.notes: Copilot shows a spinner/status line while generating.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line matching ^❯ reappears and no thinking line is visible.

detection.notes: In --allow-all mode these are completed activity signals, not pre-tool approval prompts.

events.label: Yes/no confirmation

detection.pattern: (shall I|want me to|proceed\?|are you sure|do you want|would you like)
detection.notes: Text-level confirmation detection only; not observed as a tool auth dialog during Slot 3.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line matching ^❯ reappears and no thinking line is visible.

events.label: Numbered selection

detection.notes: Speculative text-level detection inherited from the shared CLI driver pattern.

response.indexing: Driver maps zero-based selection to one-based CLI answer.

events.settled_signal: Prompt line matching ^❯ reappears and no thinking line is visible.

events.label: Question requiring text

detection.pattern: question ending in ? on a prompt or bullet line

events.settled_signal: Prompt line matching ^❯ reappears and no thinking line is visible.

events.label: Recoverable error asking for direction

detection.pattern: (error|failed|not found|doesn't exist).*?(would you like|want me to|shall I|try again)

response.method: typed instruction + Enter, or Escape for abort

events.settled_signal: Prompt line matching ^❯ reappears and no thinking line is visible.

detection.notes: Not triggered in Slot 3 because launch used --allow-all.
Not triggered in Slot 3 because launch used --allow-all.
